artifact: Kept first-pass SQL; it executed successfully and returns card names plus vintage legality status for single-faced Artifact cards.
sql: SELECT c.name, l.status FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE c.type = 'Artifact' AND c.side IS NULL AND l.format = 'vintage' ORDER BY c.name, l.status;
